Manifesto

001 — 2025

Clothing is not comfort. Clothing is armour.

We build for the margins, for the unpolished and unbroken. No softness. No apology.

Season 04 is a refusal — of trend, of season, of agreed-upon beauty.

Wear the friction. Carry the weight.
